objectiveDiffsVsLiveReadymag: Layout is semantic CSS flow, not absolute Readymag widget coordinates (designWidth≈1024 scaled canvas of ~16520px).
313 decorative shape widgets (timeline dots, rotated frames, hairline dividers) are not 1:1 widget-for-widget; binder edge + section media approximate the paper/notebook and collage language.
Icon dots are exact 34×34 transparent PNGs; on live they render 15×15 and are fully transparent so they do not paint visible marks.
Forms use mailto:hello@reversealignment.ai (honest static fallback). Live Readymag POST endpoint is not a stable public API; Typeform grant CTA preserved.
Hero motion uses a static SVG gravity-well mesh plus 58 white/lime/violet balls on accelerating counter-clockwise inspirals; no raster video runtime.
Science paper card remains 'Coming soon' disabled CTA per source.
Typography uses local plfh + IBM Plex Mono; no Google Fonts network dependency.
Footer/nav muted text slightly lightened for WCAG AA contrast (source-faithful palette retained).

assetMappingsStillExternal.originalArchive: collector repair in progress; curated semantic assets used for delivery
